My Clients

I don't just run campaigns —
I build growth engines.

I'm a performance marketing leader with 8+ years inside some of the world's most recognizable brands — scaling media investment from early traction to $25M+ annually at IPG.

My edge is moving seamlessly between high-level strategy and hands-on execution — from architecting full-funnel frameworks to piloting AI-driven betas like PMAX and AI Max, and delivering QBRs that secure multi-million dollar budgets.

Every brand's growth looks different. My approach is always rooted in data, accountability, and one thing: what actually moves the needle.

What I Specialize In

Strategy. Execution. Results.

Whether you're a startup acquiring your first customers or an established brand ready to scale, I bring the tools and experience to get you there — fast.

Paid Media & Performance Marketing

Full-funnel paid media across Search, Social, Retail & Programmatic. I manage large budgets, optimize for CAC/ROAS, and build frameworks that drive qualified demand at scale. Proven managing $25MM+ annually.

AI-Driven Campaign Strategy

Leveraging PMAX and AI Max to optimize targeting, automate bidding, and build scalable playbooks. Help brands stay ahead, reduce wasted spend, and increase returns without increasing headcount.
